id: the changes that AI is bringing to our lives
intention: AI 正在给我们的生活带来的变化
naturalChunk: the changes that AI is bringing to our lives
avoidSaying: changes that AI bringning to our lives
realLifeExamples: We need to raise awareness of the changes that AI is bringing to our lives.
People are talking more about the changes that AI is bringing to our lives.
usageNotes: 适合表达 AI 对日常生活、工作或学习正在造成的具体变化。可以放在 understand, discuss, raise awareness of 这类结构后面。
productionPrompts: 用 We need to understand ... 造一句和 AI 影响生活或学习有关的英文句子。
